channel.title: 文摘 on Entropy Decrease
channel.description: Recent content in 文摘 on Entropy Decrease

item.title: 文摘两则，可以对照着看
item.description: 在阮一峰的blog看到两则文摘，挺有意思，可以对照着看。 从少年到成年的过渡是痛苦的 No One Cares The transition from childhood to adult life is hard. Our parents give us attention all our adolescent years. But as soon as we cross an age
